languages.text: "Они мертвы". {n}Обрывает ее Батошски.{/n} "Что мертво, то неопасно и подождет. Есть дела поважнее".

traits.locale_text: "Они мертвы". {n}Обрывает ее Батошски.{/n} "Что мертво, то неопасно и подождет. Есть дела поважнее".

languages.text: "They're dead." {n}Batoshski cuts her off.{/n} "What is dead is no longer a threat and can wait. We have more pressing matters."
languages.original_text: "Они мертвы". {n}Обрывает ее Батошски.{/n} "Что мертво, то неопасно и подождет. Есть дела поважнее".

"They're dead." {n}Batoshski cuts her off.{/n} "What is dead is no longer a threat and can wait. We have more pressing matters."

languages.text: “他们已经死了。”{n}巴托什斯基打断了她。{/n}“死了的东西便不再是威胁，可以以后再说。现下，我们有更要紧的事。”
languages.original_text: "They're dead." {n}Batoshski cuts her off.{/n} "What is dead is no longer a threat and can wait. We have more pressing matters."

traits.locale_text: “他们已经死了。”{n}巴托什斯基打断了她。{/n}“死了的东西便不再是威胁，可以以后再说。现下，我们有更要紧的事。”

languages.text: "Öldüler." {n}Batoshski onun sözünü kesiyor.{/n} "Ölü olan, artık tehdit değildir ve bekleyebilir. Daha acil meselelerimiz var."
languages.original_text: "They're dead." {n}Batoshski cuts her off.{/n} "What is dead is no longer a threat and can wait. We have more pressing matters."

traits.locale_text: "Öldüler." {n}Batoshski onun sözünü kesiyor.{/n} "Ölü olan, artık tehdit değildir ve bekleyebilir. Daha acil meselelerimiz var."

languages.text: « Ils sont morts, {n}l'interrompt Batoshski.{/n} Ce qui est mort n'est plus une menace et peut donc attendre. Nous avons des problèmes plus urgents à régler. »
languages.original_text: "They're dead." {n}Batoshski cuts her off.{/n} "What is dead is no longer a threat and can wait. We have more pressing matters."

traits.locale_text: « Ils sont morts, {n}l'interrompt Batoshski.{/n} Ce qui est mort n'est plus une menace et peut donc attendre. Nous avons des problèmes plus urgents à régler. »

languages.text: «Están muertos». {n}Batoshski la interrumpe.{/n} «Lo que está muerto ya no es una amenaza y, por tanto, puede esperar. Tenemos asuntos más urgentes».
languages.original_text: "They're dead." {n}Batoshski cuts her off.{/n} "What is dead is no longer a threat and can wait. We have more pressing matters."

traits.locale_text: «Están muertos». {n}Batoshski la interrumpe.{/n} «Lo que está muerto ya no es una amenaza y, por tanto, puede esperar. Tenemos asuntos más urgentes».

languages.text: "Sie sind tot." {n}Batoshski unterbricht sie.{/n} "Was tot ist, stellt keine Gefahr mehr dar und kann warten. Wir haben dringendere Probleme."
languages.original_text: "They're dead." {n}Batoshski cuts her off.{/n} "What is dead is no longer a threat and can wait. We have more pressing matters."

traits.locale_text: "Sie sind tot." {n}Batoshski unterbricht sie.{/n} "Was tot ist, stellt keine Gefahr mehr dar und kann warten. Wir haben dringendere Probleme."

languages.text: 「死んでいる。」{n}バトシュスキーが彼女を遮る。{/n}「死んだものはもはや脅威ではなく、後回しにできる。我々にはもっと差し迫った問題がある。」
languages.original_text: "They're dead." {n}Batoshski cuts her off.{/n} "What is dead is no longer a threat and can wait. We have more pressing matters."

traits.locale_text: 「死んでいる。」{n}バトシュスキーが彼女を遮る。{/n}「死んだものはもはや脅威ではなく、後回しにできる。我々にはもっと差し迫った問題がある。」
